core_mechanism: a stratified representation-ratio index: the ratio of a subgroup's frequency within a selectively filtered high-status subset to its frequency in the full population, used as a scalar measure of systematic selection bias and tracked as a time series to detect trend inversion
brief_reason: The method quantifies under-recognition by computing the ratio between the overall share of female authors and their share among corresponding authors (a high-credit subset), then follows this ratio across 1900-2025 to detect its historical inversion.
